reviews.review_description: Turn such a fundamental concept into attractive gameplay. Had good color gradient for visuals which makes me engages more into game, instead of feeling bored or headache. Hope to see improved game-logic for multi levels with multi player feature in near future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you found the visuals engaging and enjoyable. We'll definitely take your suggestions for multi-level gameplay and multiplayer features into consideration for future updates. Stay tuned for more exciting improvements!
